title: Senior Teacher - Udemy India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Udemy India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Udemy India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Udemy India:
Udemy India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India!
